creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 238161
net/unfs3: update to 0.9.23

The new 0.10.0 version unfortunately requires a custom patched
version of the SunRPC API.  Update to 0.9.23 (last pre-changeover
version) instead.

While we are at it, fix a few warnings.

Changelog: https://github.com/unfs3/unfs3/releases/tag/unfs3-0.9.23

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.1.
